# Orange Cloud

> Orange Cloud is a native iOS app (iPhone & iPad, iOS 26+) for managing Cloudflare. It signs in through Cloudflare's official OAuth 2.0 + PKCE flow — no API token pasting — and covers domains, DNS records, traffic analytics, Workers with real-time log streaming, R2 / D1 / KV storage, WAF custom rules, and Cloudflare Tunnel status.

Key facts:

- Platform: iOS 26.0 or later, built with Swift and SwiftUI; localized in English, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese (Taiwan), Traditional Chinese (Hong Kong), and Japanese.
- Authentication: Cloudflare's official OAuth 2.0 with PKCE and per-scope permission selection. Tokens are stored only in the iOS Keychain. The OAuth callback relay on this site forwards the temporary authorization code to the app without storing anything.
- Pricing: free tier includes one account with full domain/DNS management and 24-hour analytics; a Pro subscription or one-time purchase unlocks multi-account, storage (R2 / D1 / KV), Workers live tail, WAF, Tunnel, and longer analytics ranges.
- Open source: the source code is licensed under AGPL-3.0 + Commons Clause; self-compiled builds can unlock all Pro features via the `OPENSOURCE_UNLOCKED` compilation flag.
- Author: chen2he (https://github.com/chen2he).

## Pages

- [Home](https://orange-cloud.chatiro.app/): product overview, feature tour, screenshots, free vs Pro comparison
- [Privacy Policy](https://orange-cloud.chatiro.app/privacy): what data the app touches and what never leaves the device
- [Terms of Service](https://orange-cloud.chatiro.app/terms): usage terms for the official build
- [Contact](https://orange-cloud.chatiro.app/contact): support contact

Localized versions are served under locale prefixes, e.g. https://orange-cloud.chatiro.app/zh-Hans (简体中文), /zh-Hant (繁體中文・台灣), /zh-HK (繁體中文・香港), /ja (日本語). English is the default at the root path.

## Project

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/chen2he/orange-cloud): full source code (iOS app + this website), issues, and contribution guide
- [App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/id6779323783): official build with free tier and optional Pro

## Notes

- Orange Cloud is an independent third-party client and is not affiliated with or endorsed by Cloudflare, Inc.
